data.valueProposition: Gauntlet graduates are AI-first operators who bridge the talent gap in tech companies.
differentiators: Solves talent problems, not technology problems
data.toneGuidance: Confident, technical, and solution-oriented with a focus on leadership and strategic impact
keyMessages: CTOs and engineering leaders need AI-first talent to drive innovation—Gauntlet delivers it.
Most AI pilots fail due to talent shortages, not technology limitations—Gauntlet solves that.
